title: PlayTime Forever
description: This mod adds some of the most remebrable toys and the "GrabPack" of the "Poppy PlayTime" universe
body:
Join our discord server plzzzz: [DISCORD](https://discord.com/invite/AX9XfjV9A2)

 This is a fan version of the Minecraft mod dedicated to Poppy Playtime. The official developer of the game is Mob Entertainment, all rights belong to them
 
Hello internet welcome to Playtime.Co,wait wrong line...

Hello welcome to Playtime.Co the largest toy factory in the world!
Meet The Experements,they are going wanders through your world, 
discover the Playtime.Co's Legacy,finding abandoned 
stores and reconstruct the once gigantic Playtime.Co's empire!

FEATURES:

•The mod has almost 50 blocks and deco!

![blocks!!!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e6100c3e62526a47d11bdf0dce5f169bc900025.png)

•The mod has an experement creation mechanic!

![Crafting!!!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/487309d35711ac5bbaebabbce2567c1fb7bd4411.gif)

•The mod has different GrabPack Models to create!
 *tho our GrabPack dosn`t work, YET!



Dependences:

![plz instal GekoLib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8561a4b4535b1ac3cb0c4bd4e4626f15e00804a7.png)

 

"What's the time? Playtime!"

 *EXCLAMER the curent version of the mod is a beta none of the features above are active
